issue.title: Go-only sweep lane 1177: remove remaining Python assets batch 7/10

blocker.summary: The repo-wide physical Python count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1177 changes, so the lane could not reduce it further numerically.

notes: BIG-GO-1177 is closed out by committed replacement evidence and regression coverage rather than a fresh deletion.
The target priority areas are src/bigclaw, tests, scripts, and bigclaw-go/scripts.
